# ReqRun GitHub Repo

ReqRun is a reliability layer for OpenAI-compatible LLM request execution.

Its job is narrow:
- accept OpenAI-style chat completion requests
- queue them durably
- retry transient failures
- deduplicate repeated logical operations
- expose a stable request id and later status

## Start here

- README.md
- docs/dev-quickstart.md
- docs/agent-guide.md
- openapi.yaml
- examples/README.md
- packages/sdk-js/README.md
- SECURITY.md

## Public product entry points

- Marketing site: https://www.reqrun.com
- Docs: https://www.reqrun.com/docs
- Quickstart: https://www.reqrun.com/docs/quickstart
- API reference: https://www.reqrun.com/docs/api
- TypeScript SDK docs: https://www.reqrun.com/docs/sdk/typescript
- Machine-readable docs: https://www.reqrun.com/llms.txt
- Extended machine-readable docs: https://www.reqrun.com/llms-full.txt

## Canonical request facts

Base URL:
https://api.reqrun.com

Auth:
Bearer ReqRun project API key

Submit endpoint:
POST /v1/chat/completions

Status endpoint:
GET /v1/requests/{id}

Important behavior:
- ReqRun request ids start with rr_
- use wait=true for fast-path completion
- use wait=false for background work
- use idempotency_key for retried or repeatable operations

## Product boundary

ReqRun does:
- request queueing
- retry logic
- idempotency
- wait mode
- request status visibility

ReqRun does not do:
- streaming in v1
- multi-provider routing
- workflow orchestration
- analytics product surface
- provider marketplace behavior

## Repo surfaces for later public split

This repo already contains split-ready example starters for:
- Next.js route handlers
- Express APIs
- FastAPI services
- Cloudflare Workers
- Vercel functions
- Netlify functions
- Supabase edge functions
- AWS Lambda
- GitHub Actions
- cron-based polling flows

Those examples are intended to become separate public repos under the ReqRun GitHub org later.

## Runnable standalone repos

The first real clone-and-run public example repos are:

- https://github.com/ReqRun/reqrun-example-nextjs-route-handler
- https://github.com/ReqRun/reqrun-example-express-api
- https://github.com/ReqRun/reqrun-example-fastapi-service
- https://github.com/ReqRun/reqrun-example-cloudflare-worker
- https://github.com/ReqRun/reqrun-example-aws-lambda
- https://github.com/ReqRun/reqrun-example-vercel-function
